_meta.note: experience[] uses Experience-compatible shape (company/position/period/type) so portfolio components written for src/types/index.ts can consume it directly. Education entries carry type:'education'. SAIT is one merged entry here; src/data/experiences.ts splits it into two programs (Data Analytics 2024-2025, Integrated AI 2025-2026) — that file is authoritative for rendering.
_meta.narrativeFieldsTodo: problem and impact are empty strings on all work entries — JobPilot source has only bullet text (mapped to solution[]). Fill these in manually for portfolio rendering, or let the portfolio fall back to solution-only display.

basics.headline: AI Engineer & Builder — 17+ years software, 2+ years AI/LLM
basics.tagline: Builder, not theorist. Ships AI tools daily across 5+ providers.
basics.summary: AI Engineer with 17+ years of software development experience and 2+ years focused on AI/LLM engineering. Builder of 15+ shipped AI projects spanning multi-agent orchestration, RAG, computer vision, and ASR. Senior Java/backend background from Beijing tech (Bitmain, fintech, e-commerce, telecom). Currently completing Post-Diploma in Data Analytics & Integrated AI at SAIT (4.0 GPA).

solution: Built JobPilot AI — agentic job automation pipeline orchestrating 5 LLM providers (GLM, Qwen, DeepSeek, GROQ, Ollama) with circuit breakers, structured output via Pydantic, and reflexive quality gates across 1,250+ automated tests, 4 discovery sources, and auto-apply via real Chrome
Developed Industry-AI-Flow — enterprise RAG platform with 4 specialized AI agents, hybrid retrieval (BM25 + vector search + reranking), and LangChain 1.0 orchestration across 25K+ lines of Python

Created Talk2Type — macOS voice dictation tool integrating 8 ASR services (OpenAI, Groq, Alibaba, Tencent, Baidu, iFlytek, AssemblyAI, Speechmatics) with intelligent provider routing achieving 90%+ cost savings
Built vox — Go-based voice-to-clipboard tool with dual ASR providers (Groq Whisper + SiliconFlow SenseVoice), LLM correction pipeline with fallback chain, and A/B testing framework
Developed Claude-Code-Remote — remote control system for AI coding agents via 3 channels (email, Discord, Telegram) enabling autonomous task execution
Created akm — lightweight encrypted API Key Manager in Go for 7 LLM providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, GROQ, DeepSeek, Qwen, GLM) with AES-256-GCM encryption and Unix socket API
Built ai-code-reviewer — automated code review tool orchestrating 4 collaborative AI models (Claude, Gemini, Qwen, GLM) for multi-perspective analysis
Developed multi-agent cross-validated research system with 4 independent AI agents investigating Canadian immigration policy across Federal, Provincial, Legal, and Community evidence sources
Created AI-powered trading platform with 3 autonomous strategies (Funding Rate Arbitrage, Spot Trend Following, On-chain Signal Trading) and TradingView webhook integration
Built MacOS AI Disk Cleaner — Swift native app using AI analysis for intelligent disk space management on macOS

Designed AgenticAI2026 — interactive AI agent architecture curriculum for senior developers covering multi-agent patterns, tool orchestration, MCP integration, and production deployment of agentic systems
Built AI workflow platform with LangChain featuring intent recognition and multi-agent orchestration
Created document knowledge base (Zhub) implementing RAG system with vector search
Developed enterprise building management system as monorepo with ASP.NET Core 8, Next.js 15, and React Native
Developed cross-platform mobile apps using React Native with Redux, Firebase, and biometric authentication
Implemented CI/CD automation with GitHub Actions for multi-platform deployment
Developed HockeyAI-Tracker comparing 4 vision models (RF-DETR, RT-DETR, YOLO11, YOLO-World) for real-time player and puck tracking with cross-platform benchmarking (NVIDIA + Apple Silicon)
Built ThyroidSentry cancer prediction system achieving 97.4% accuracy with SHAP interpretability using XGBoost and scikit-learn
Created Canada Unemployment Analysis Dashboard with interactive data visualization and ML-based predictions
Developed automated ETL workflows and data quality pipelines using Python for enterprise data processing
Achieved 4.0/4.0 GPA across all semesters while working part-time as a developer

experience.position: Senior Java Backend Developer / Team Lead
solution: Built customer scoring models with Python and Scikit-learn, improving automated approval rate by 40%
Leveraged Python (Pandas, NumPy) to analyze transaction data, identifying bottlenecks and increasing conversion rate by 22%
Designed and implemented rule-based risk evaluation engine handling 5K+ daily risk assessments, improving automation rate by 40%
Architected high-concurrency bidding and flash sale system with 10K+ concurrent users using RocketMQ and Redis caching
Improved order processing system handling 10K+ daily transactions, optimized API response time by 40% through query tuning and caching
Designed and implemented RBAC + Position-Based Access Control for 1K+ users with Redis caching for permission lookup
Led migration from traditional VM architecture to Kubernetes-based cloud-native infrastructure
Built automated CI/CD pipelines with Jenkins and GitLab, reducing deployment time by 50%
Implemented blue-green deployments for zero-downtime releases with comprehensive monitoring using SkyWalking and Pinpoint
Designed business intelligence dashboards using Python and visualization libraries for real-time KPI tracking
Developed ETL processes in Python to unify data from multiple enterprise systems
Led multiple development teams overseeing technical design and project delivery for enterprise clients
Developed high-performance Bitcoin trading API integrating Bitcoind RPC for mining pool and wallet payment systems
Designed UTXO-based transaction model for efficient blockchain interactions
Implemented Redis + MySQL infrastructure for high-throughput cryptocurrency transaction processing
Integrated Google Authenticator and OAuth for antpool.com marketplace security
Designed REST API for mobile app and integrated JSON-RPC for cross-exchange platform connectivity
Independently designed and implemented payment system integration for P2P lending platform, handling transaction settlement and reconciliation
Refactored payment security module applying cryptographic best practices (AES, RSA) for transaction signing and verification
Built RESTful API layer for P2P backend services following API design best practices
Managed Alibaba Cloud infrastructure: application deployment, Linux server administration, and environment configuration
Developed custom MyBatis code generator using Velocity templates to accelerate development workflow
Performed database query optimization including SQL tuning, index optimization, and MySQL configuration for high-performance queries

experience.company: Beijing GoHigh Softone Technology (北京高鸿软通)
solution: Served as lead developer for China Mobile Henan Online Business Hall (河南移动网上营业厅), handling new feature development and system optimization for millions of subscribers
Led multiple system refactoring initiatives for the online business hall, improving code quality and system maintainability
Developed and maintained telecom business modules on Oracle + SSH (Struts/Spring/Hibernate) + WebSphere/Resin stack
Gained deep expertise in telecom industry business logic, compliance requirements, and development standards

experience.company: Beijing GoHigh Softone Technology (北京高鸿软通)
solution: Developed China Mobile Henan Online and Mobile Business Hall (网上营业厅/掌上营业厅) serving millions of mobile subscribers across Henan province
Built and maintained telecom self-service features including billing queries, plan management, and value-added service ordering
Worked with Oracle database, SSH framework (Struts/Spring/Hibernate), and Linux server environments

experience.coursework: Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Computer Vision, NLP, Python, SQL, Power BI

certifications: Microsoft: T-SQL Querying, Data Analytics, Power BI Reports

aiAndLlm: LLM Integration (Claude, GPT, GLM, Qwen, DeepSeek, GROQ, Ollama)
LangChain / RAG / Vector Search / Prompt Engineering
LLM Reliability (circuit breakers, retry/backoff, provider fallback chains)

Multi-agent orchestration with circuit breakers, structured output, fallback chains
Builds AND uses AI tools daily — builder, not theorist
Enterprise production experience with high-concurrency systems
